basic_details.job_title: RRB JE CBT-I Result 2026 OUT (Direct Link) - Download Scorecard @ rrbapply.gov.in
basic_details.short_information: Quick Summary: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has declared the RRB JE CBT-I Result 2026 on 13th May 2026 for CEN 05/2025. Candidates can check their qualifying status and merit list on respective regional RRB websites. Check cutoff marks, scorecard details, and next selection process (CBT-2) below.

important_instructions: ✓ Download and save the result PDF immediately ✓ Take multiple printouts for future reference ✓ Prepare for CBT-II examination ✓ Keep all original documents ready for Document Verification ✓ Check official website regularly for CBT-2 schedule ✓ Verify all details and report discrepancies if any
